name: SCC_CM_Validate_Cnf
title: SCC_CM_Validate_Cnf
syntax: void SCC_CM_Validate_Cnf ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMacAddress[], dword Result, dword ToggleNum )
description: The callback is called as soon as a CM_Validate.Cnf message is received. Further details (signal type) that are transmitted in this request can be queried with SCC_SLAC_GetSignalType.

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte).

parameters.name: SourceAddress
parameters.description: MAC Address of the EV which initiates the SLAC process.

parameters.name: NumSounds
parameters.description: Number of M-Sounds used to generate the ATTEN_PROFILE.

parameters.name: AAG
parameters.description: Average Attenuation Group (array length is indicated by the parameter NumGroups).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
